title: Champions
tmdbOverview: A disgraced basketball coach is given the chance to coach Los Amigos, a team of players who are intellectually disabled, and soon realizes they just might have what it takes to make it to the national championships.
synopsis: Released in 2018, Champions is a comedy, family and drama film from Spain. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a 8 certification (CH rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
